prompt: Run syncdocs only for context/progress-tracker.md. A feature that used to be listed as next is now complete; don't touch architecture or UI docs.
assertions: Honors the user-specified scope and does not default to all context files
Checks current status, completed features, next work, and stale decisions in progress-tracker.md
Updates only context/progress-tracker.md when changes are justified
Does not modify architecture, UI registry, UI token/rule, library, or source files
Leaves uncertain claims in drift detected but not fixed instead of inventing facts
Reports a concise Context Sync Report
